chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.381 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- The State/ANF through Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor, ANF. Respondents:- Bilal Jadoon and Yaseen Jadoon. Date of hearing:- 22.12.2025 O R D E R =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: On 14.10.2024 ANF arrested accused Akhtar Khan and Abdul Aziz travelling on a motorcycle and recovered a carton from their possession containing 14.440 kilograms Charas. During interrogation, allegedly they took names of respondents as their accomplices; hence they were arrayed as accused in this case. Thereafter, they surrendered before the trial Curt and were granted interim pre-arrest bail which has been confirmed through impugned order against which this application for cancellation has been filed on the ground that applicants are previous convict which is mentioned in the challan. 2. Previous conviction is no ground to deny an accused concession of bail when otherwise prima facie there is no evidence of involvement in the case against them. The importance of evidence in the shape of statement of co-accused is yet to be determined by the trial Court. We do not find any error or illegality in the impugned order, consequently this application is dismissed. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
